ValidationRule.description: Prevent the field from being edited if Opp stage = Closed Won. Except BizOps
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Annual_price_increase_on_T_C_s__c), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') , NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')) , $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only BizOps team can edit this field.
